title: Verify cancellation flow when Incentive Offer is disabled
description: Test the cancellation flow when the discount offer is disabled in the backend.
preconditions: The incentive offer is disabled in the backend

steps.description: 2. On the Loss Aversion pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The trial is immediately cancelled (no offer pop-up is shown), and the feedback pop-up is displayed.
